TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kakurut, title = Kakurut, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kakurut} }

S.FORM: kakurut malecaday atu tananuman, u mikayatay a masarengusay ku caang, kilemel a mikucakuc. Dengay a mibuhat tu sakaen, tu su'aw, tu caledes, tu duku, tu lemawan ku kakurut. I tini i Taywan, Makala tu patekenan ku mihecaan nu nika'urip nu kakurut nu lutuk. Belung samin i matini a paluma, a mibuwah. u tapang nu sinabek nu payniyaru'. U Pangcah han tu i, makaen ku lusay nu kakurut, makaen naca ku luengelay a teluc nu caay atu papah. U langdaw nu papah mikialengel tu ni palumaan a kakurut, kilemel ku nika' urip nu caang sisa awa:ay ku kemanay nu cirekay, saka ulahan nu tamdaw a kemaen. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: kako~u~uro~u~ut maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ato~u~u tanano~u~uman, o~u~u mikajataj a masarəŋo~u~usaj ko~u~u ʦaaŋ, kiɾəməɾ a miko~u~uʦako~u~uʦ. ɬ~ɮəŋaj a mib~b~vo~u~uħat to~u~u sakaən, to~u~u so~u~uʡaw, to~u~u ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs, to~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~u, to~u~u ɾəmawan ko~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut. i tini i tajwan, makaɾa to~u~u patəkənan ko~u~u miħəʦaan no~u~u nikaʡo~u~urip no~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk. b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ samin i matini a paɾo~u~uma, a mib~b~vo~u~uwaħ. o~u~u tapaŋ no~u~u sinab~b~vək no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~u paŋʦaħ ħan to~u~u i, makaən ko~u~u ɾo~u~usaj no~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut, makaən naʦa ko~u~u ɾo~u~uəŋəɾaj a təɾo~u~uʦ no~u~u ʦaaj ato~u~u papaħ. o~u~u ɾaŋɬ~ɮaw no~u~u papaħ mikiaɾəŋəɾ to~u~u ni paɾo~u~umaan a kako~u~uro~u~ut, kiɾəməɾ ko~u~u nikaʡ o~u~urip no~u~u ʦaaŋ sisa awa:aj ko~u~u kəmanaj no~u~u ʦirəkaj, saka o~u~uɾaħan no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a kəmaən. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: kakurut malecaday atu tananuman, u mikayatay a masarengusay ku caang, kilemel a mikucakuc. Dengay a mibuhat tu sakaen, tu su'aw, tu caledes, tu duku, tu lemawan ku kakurut. I tini i Taywan, Makala tu patekenan ku mihecaan nu nika'urip nu kakurut nu lutuk. Belung samin i matini a paluma, a mibuwah. u tapang nu sinabek nu payniyaru'. U Pangcah han tu i, makaen ku lusay nu kakurut, makaen naca ku luengelay a teluc nu caay atu papah. U langdaw nu papah mikialengel tu ni palumaan a kakurut, kilemel ku nika' urip nu caang sisa awa:ay ku kemanay nu cirekay, saka ulahan nu tamdaw a kemaen. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: kako~u~uro~u~ut maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ato~u~u tanano~u~uman, o~u~u mikajataj a masarəŋo~u~usaj ko~u~u ʦaaŋ, kiɾəməɾ a miko~u~uʦako~u~uʦ. ɬ~ɮəŋaj a mib~b~vo~u~uħat to~u~u sakaən, to~u~u so~u~uʡaw, to~u~u ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs, to~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~u, to~u~u ɾəmawan ko~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut. i tini i tajwan, makaɾa to~u~u patəkənan ko~u~u miħəʦaan no~u~u nikaʡo~u~urip no~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk. b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ samin i matini a paɾo~u~uma, a mib~b~vo~u~uwaħ. o~u~u tapaŋ no~u~u sinab~b~vək no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~u paŋʦaħ ħan to~u~u i, makaən ko~u~u ɾo~u~usaj no~u~u kako~u~uro~u~ut, makaən naʦa ko~u~u ɾo~u~uəŋəɾaj a təɾo~u~uʦ no~u~u ʦaaj ato~u~u papaħ. o~u~u ɾaŋɬ~ɮaw no~u~u papaħ mikiaɾəŋəɾ to~u~u ni paɾo~u~umaan a kako~u~uro~u~ut, kiɾəməɾ ko~u~u nikaʡ o~u~urip no~u~u ʦaaŋ sisa awa:aj ko~u~u kəmanaj no~u~u ʦirəkaj, saka o~u~uɾaħan no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a kəmaən. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
